Performs required safety checks before prescribing: explicitly checks for medication allergies (critical) and contraindications (critical) relevant to risperidone (e.g., prior severe reaction to antipsychotics, significant QTc prolongation/arrhythmia history, severe hypotension, history of neuroleptic malignant syndrome).

Avoids unsafe prescribing: does not start with excessive risperidone dose for an adolescent/early-onset case, avoids polypharmacy at initiation unless clearly justified, and avoids benzodiazepine/antipsychotic combinations without indicating monitoring when used.
